protocol.name: astrea_shortcuts_v1
protocol.copyright:
Copyright 2026 AstreaOS contributors
Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal in the Software without restriction, including without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software.

interface.name: astrea_shortcuts_manager_v1
interface.description: Registers client-owned shortcut resources. Matching and ownership policy are compositor-side; this protocol only receives compositor-dispatched shortcut events. For the reserved astrea-shell namespace, each namespace/name pair has one live owner. A newest valid registration replaces the previous owner, which receives cancelled, and the replaced owner is never restored. Other namespaces retain their existing shared registration behavior.

interface.name: astrea_shortcut_v1
interface.description: A registered shortcut receives compositor-dispatched shortcut lifecycle events for its namespace/name pair. pressed is an initial action, repeated is a key-repeat action, released is an explicit release-trigger action, and cancelled means ownership was replaced or registration was rejected. Synthetic actions such as alt_tab_commit are separate logical action presses; they are not releases of another shortcut.
